mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or positive 20-day returns occur in fewer than 50% of rate-cut months.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in more than 60% of instances where unemployment rises above the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates robust consumer demand and construction activity, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in both series fail to yield positive 60-day returns in more than 55% of observed cases.

mechanism_narrative: Increases in the industrial production index reflect strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns show no statistical significance with a p-value greater than 0.10 during early-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index levels above 220 trigger expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 20-day returns in more than 65% of months where CPI exceeds the specified threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirm broad-based labor market strength, supporting corporate earnings and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative 60-day returns in more than 50% of observed periods.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter increases in real gross domestic product signal expanding economic output and corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 across all rolling 5-year windows or positive returns occur in fewer than 45% of GDP growth quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month contraction in industrial production indicates sudden supply-side disruption or demand collapse, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in more than 60% of months following the specified production decline.
